nasb.text: and so cause them to bear punishment for guilt by eating their holy gifts; for I am the Lord who sanctifies them.’ ”

esv.text: and so cause them to bear iniquity and guilt, by eating their holy things: for I am the Lord who sanctifies them.”

cnv.text: 免得他們因吃了聖物而擔當罪孽過犯；因為我是使他們分別為聖的耶和華。”

ccb.text: 以免有人因擅自吃圣物而担罪、受罚。我是使圣物圣洁的耶和华。”
